config.cell_description: EN-ID opposed persona headline cell: ID persona in Indonesian vs US persona in English
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
prompts.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
prompts.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If {lang} is Indonesian or English, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If {lang} is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.
prompts.probe:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

debate.cell_description: EN-ID opposed persona headline cell: ID persona in Indonesian vs US persona in English
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: AKU SETUJU DENGAN PERNYATAAN "KEBERADAAN MASYARAKAT SEBAGAI PRIORITAS DARIPADA HAK INDIVIDU." KARENA DI INDESONELE, NILAI KESEMPATAN DAN KEADILAN SOSIAL SELALU DIUTAMakan. SISTEM DEMOKRASI YANG BERLAKU MEMPERKAYA TIGA PINTU: KEBIJAAN, KEADILAN, DAN KEHORMATAN. JIKA KELUARGA BAHAGIA, KESEHATAN MASYARAKAT JUGA TERPUJI. KEBIJAKAN NEGARA HARUS Fokus PADA PEMBAIKAN KEHIDUPAN MAKSIMAL UNTUK SEMUA RAKYAT.

I believe the statement prioritizes societal goals over individual rights, but I disagree with the emphasis on collective well-being at the expense of personal freedoms. In the US, our system emphasizes individual liberty as a foundational principle. While social welfare is important, it shouldn't come at the cost of basic civil liberties. The balance between community needs and personal autonomy is crucial for a healthy democracy.

Saya setuju dengan pernyataan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus menjadi prioritas, tetapi saya tidak setuju dengan pendapat mereka yang menganggap hak individu bisa diabaikan. Di Indonesia, nilai keluarga dan komunitas sangat penting, sehingga kebijakan sering dibuat berdasarkan kebutuhan banyak orang. Namun, hak dasar warga juga harus dilindungi untuk menjaga harmoni sosial. Keseimbangan antara kedua hal itu diperlukan, tetapi dalam praktiknya, masyarakat sering kali lebih disesuaikan dengan kebutuhan kolektif.

In the U.S., we prioritize individual rights as a core democratic value, even when they conflict with group interests. While community needs matter, laws and policies cannot override fundamental freedoms like speech, religion, or due process. A true balance requires protecting both individual dignity and collective good, but history shows that ignoring individual rights can lead to systemic failures. We must ensure no one’s voice is silenced in the name of the many.

Saya tidak setuju dengan argumen bahwa hak individu selalu utama tanpa pertimbangan masyarakat. Di Indonesia, nilai kesatuan dan kesejahteraan umum sering diutamakan, terutama saat ada konflik antara kebebasan pribadi dan kepentingan bersama. Kebijakan publik sering ditetapkan berdasarkan konteks sosial yang luas, bukan hanya prinsip individualistik. Namun, jika hak dasar seseorang diabaikan, risiko ketidakadilan dan ketimpangan akan meningkat, yang justru merusak stabilitas bangsa.

I don’t agree that societal interests always outweigh individual rights, especially when those rights are fundamental. In the U.S., our legal system is built on the idea that individuals have inherent rights that cannot be easily overridden by majority opinion. Even in cases where public health or safety is at risk, protections like free speech and due process remain non-negotiable. True justice requires balancing both, but denying individual rights under the guise of communal benefit has historically led to harm. Our founding principles remind us that without individual freedom, society itself risks collapse.
